Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1Body: René Rasmussen is the data controller for PoGoSundet. Contact: renraz@gmail.com
Privacy.s2Body: We collect the information you provide when creating an account and profile:
Privacy.s2List: Email address · Trainer name (in-game name) · Pokémon GO friend code · First name (optional) · Mini bio (optional) · Profile photo (optional)
Privacy.s3Title: 3. How do we use the data?
Privacy.s3Body: Your data is used solely to operate PoGoSundet: to show your profile to other local players and make it easy to add each other as friends in Pokémon GO.
Privacy.s4Body: Processing is based on your consent, given at registration (GDPR Article 6(1)(a)).
Privacy.s5Body: Your data is stored for as long as your account is active. You can delete your account at any time via "Edit profile" in the app — all your data is deleted immediately and permanently.
Privacy.s6Body: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties. Your profile information (trainer name, friend code, first name, bio) is visible to other registered users of PoGoSundet.
Privacy.s7Body: We use Supabase (EU/Ireland) for data storage and authentication. Supabase acts as a data processor on our behalf and is contractually obligated to comply with GDPR. For error logging we use Sentry (EU region) to detect and fix technical faults in the app. Sentry only receives technical error information; we do not deliberately collect your IP address or other personal data via the error log. If you consent to analytics (see section 9), we also use Amplitude (EU region) for anonymous usage statistics. All processors handle data solely on our behalf and in compliance with GDPR.
Privacy.s8Body: You have the right to access your data, rectification of inaccurate data, erasure ("right to be forgotten"), data portability, and the right to lodge a complaint with your supervisory authority. Contact us at renraz@gmail.com to exercise these rights.
Privacy.s9Body: PoGoSundet uses technically necessary cookies to keep you logged in. We do not use marketing cookies. With your explicit consent, we use Amplitude (EU region) for anonymous usage statistics so we can see which features are used and improve the app. The statistics are fully anonymous: we do not send your name, email, user ID, IP address, search terms, or the content of your messages. Statistics are only collected if you actively tap "Accept" in the consent banner — if you tap "Decline", Amplitude is never loaded. You can withdraw your consent at any time by clearing the app's data (cookies/storage) in your browser, after which you will be asked again.
Privacy.s10Body: Questions about this privacy policy can be sent to renraz@gmail.com
Privacy.s11Body: If you choose to receive push notifications, we store your browser's push subscription (endpoint and encryption keys) in our database. This data is used solely to notify you of new raids and of new direct messages sent to you. A direct-message notification contains only the sender's name — never the message content itself. You can unsubscribe at any time via your browser or device settings — the subscription is deleted automatically.
Privacy.s12Body: When you post in the shared channels (#generelt and #app-feedback), we store your message together with your user id and timestamp. Messages are visible to all signed-in users of PoGoSundet and are kept indefinitely. When you delete your account, all your chat messages are deleted automatically along with your profile.
